a.xlink:title: Calculate Metabolic Pathway heterogeneity.
This process calculates the pathway activities in different groups and subsets.
This process takes Seurat object as input and pass it to the next processes in the `ScrnaMetabolicLandscape` group.
This process performs enrichment analysis for the metabolic pathways for each group in each subset.

Tessa is a Bayesian model to integrate T cell receptor (TCR) sequence profiling with transcriptomes of T cells.
